name: search_threads
trigger_description:
Use this tool when the user asks to:
Find conversations with a specific person, customer, or group
Locate ongoing or historical discussions about a topic
Identify active deal, project, or decision-related threads
Narrow the search space before retrieving full thread content
Do not use this tool when:
A specific message or thread ID is already known
Full message or thread content is immediately required (use retrieval tools instead)
Prefer structured search parameters. Use raw_query only when the user explicitly provides Gmail search syntax.
For thread messages, use get_messages to get the metadata of the messages.
